# phala_account (Data Source)

Returns current account info (user profile + credits + active workspace linkage).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `avatar` (String)
- `credit_balance` (String)
- `credit_granted_balance` (String)
- `credit_is_post_paid` (Boolean)
- `credit_outstanding_amount` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `email_verified` (Boolean)
- `has_backup_codes` (Boolean)
- `has_password` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) Stable account identifier for this data source state.
- `role` (String)
- `totp_enabled` (Boolean)
- `username` (String)
- `workspace_id` (String)
- `workspace_name` (String)
- `workspace_role` (String)
- `workspace_slug` (String)
- `workspace_tier` (String)
